noteForHumanReviewer: All 23 questions are ready for review. 13 (fill-in-blank and multiple-choice) have complete paper-solution correspondence — ready_for_approval means only a spot-check against PDF is needed. 10 solution-type questions have full derivations but no short answerCandidate; ready_with_info means the content is complete from the Markdown. No blocked questions remain — the 8 previously-reported missing_solution anomalies were false alarms caused by OCR merging sections 二 and 三 into one solution block.
